cit.basis: Standard 22.5% CIT on taxable profit (Income Tax Law No. 91 of 2005, as amended), administered by the Egyptian Tax Authority (ETA).
cit.note: Oil & gas exploration and production companies are taxed at 40.55%; the Suez Canal Authority, the Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation (EGPC) and the Central Bank of Egypt at 40%.

small_enterprise_regime.note: Simplified small-enterprise regime (Law No. 6 of 2025): businesses with annual turnover up to EGP 20 million may opt for a turnover-based tax of 0.4%-1.5% instead of profit-based CIT. Out of scope for this profit-based estimator.

vat.note: Standard VAT rate of 14% (VAT Law No. 67 of 2016); reduced rates and exemptions apply to specific goods and services.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector-specific rates, the Law 6/2025 turnover regime, WHT, relief, filing, and free-zone rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
